stories.original_headline: Ireland’s Old Irish Goat has survived 3,000 years
stories.original_summary: The Old Irish Goat isn’t just part of folklore — it’s genetically linked to goats that lived in Ireland 3,000 years ago. Scientists analyzed ancient remains and discovered that today’s rare breed shares its strongest DNA ties with Late Bronze Age animals. The finding suggests an unbroken Irish linea
stories.fantasy_headline: Ancient Bloodline: Ireland's Mystical Goats Link to Olden Times
stories.fantasy_story: Sages have uncovered a magical truth about Ireland's Old Irish Goats. These creatures, long thought mere folklore, carry the very blood of goats from three millennia past. Their ancient lineage reveals an unbroken connection to the creatures of the Late Bronze Age, a truly wondrous discovery.

stories.original_headline: Your smart TV may be crawling the web for AI
stories.original_summary: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. These days, if you sign up for a new streaming service, you generally have two options: Either pay a massive premium for an ad-free exp
stories.fantasy_headline: Beware! Your Scrying Mirror May Seek Aether Secrets!
stories.fantasy_story: Whispers travel through the land that your enchanted viewing orb, a common household artifact, might be secretly gathering information from the Aether itself. Some believe these devices seek out knowledge for grand Golem intelligences. Be mindful of which Seer's Scrolls you subscribe to, as they may reveal more than just entertainment.

stories.original_headline: 8BitDo’s customizable Pro 3 controller is $30 off for the first time
stories.original_summary: Woot is offering steep discounts on many video games and accessories, some of which are fairly recent releases. No matter what you choose from its sale catalog, you can get up to $30 off your order with the code LEVEL20 used at checkout through the end of the day on February 27th (the sale lasts […]
stories.fantasy_headline: Grand Bazaar Bargain! Enchanted Gauntlet Price Slashed!
stories.fantasy_story: The esteemed Merchant's Guild of Woot's Bazaar announces a grand opportunity for adventurers! For the first time ever, the customizable Arcane Gauntlet of Play, a sought-after relic for magical contests, is available with a substantial discount. Purchase now and save thirty shining gold coins on your enchanted questing gear.
